changes: Initial structured file
Populated CAS, COP, CFS, HFMP, CLAB with detailed entries.
CAS massively expanded with all referenced agents; CPO IDs wired to CAS-*/COP-*.
CAS extended with additional referenced agents (Mitolipin, Succinate, OAA, LL-37, Actovegin, Boron, Pancreatic enzymes).

Maximal CAS expansion per user list: added BHB, Fisetin, Jiaogulan, Mahkota Dewa, Ononis spinosa, Ginkgo, Lithium microdose, Enclomiphene, hCG, Testosterone (exogenous), Choline/Lecithin/Ox bile (negative), Fermented foods, Black Coffee, Kefir microbiota, generic SBOs, Acacia fiber, Sulforaphane, Angion v2, and related items.
Upgraded CPO with COP/CFS/HFMP crosslinks, operator ritual, contraindications and progression criteria. Added schema crosslink columns to CAS, COP, CFS, HFMP.

Added Foundation_Framework sheet; expanded CAS with glutathione (oral + liposomal), medical ozone, 7,8-DHF, 4'-DMA-7,8-DHF, Mucuna/L-DOPA, Maca, Fadogia, Bulbine, Muira, Damiana, Tribulus; updated CPO Phases 1.5/2/3 with optional redox/neuroplasticity tools; created Product_Table with HCGenerate ES and Edovis mapped to CAS.
Integrated TTFD, Uridine, Sulbuthiamine, Methylated B-complex, Boron, Piracetam and Phenylpiracetam into CAS and CPO per phase mapping.
Reconstructed Expansionist B: Added NAC, Tributyrin, L. reuteri, Semax, Mucuna, Ecklonia Cava to CPO; updated CAS accordingly.
Added Role column in CAS (psyllium tagged as Binder) and Binder_Window column in CPO for explicit AM fasted binder timing.
Deduplicated Tributyrin CAS entries; added CAS-NEURO-13 (Magnesium β-Hydroxybutyrate, MHB) and wired it into CPO Phase 2 and 3 as optional neurosexual module.
Added HMB (CAS-NEURO-14) to CAS; added HMB to CPO Phase 2 & 3 as neurosexual/androgenic module.

CAS audit expansion: added MB, Urolithin A, Niacinamide, Riboflavin, Cabergoline, Bromocriptine, T2, NDT, T3, Lugol's, KI, flush niacin, DAO, PS, cocoa flavanols, pentoxifylline, artichoke extract, milk thistle, hyaluronic acid, orthosilicic acid, microdose lithium.

CAS metadata normalization: Agmatine updated to Agmatine sulfate + filled CFS/HFMP/role/phase-dosage fields; Berberine entry enriched (kill-phase/metabolic role) + filled CFS/HFMP/role/phase-dosage fields.

Removed Ecklonia cava from CPO (kept in CAS; removed pre-sex/Angion entry; replaced pre-workout row with Endotelon). Added Endotelon (standardized grape seed OPC) to CAS + Product Table; updated Phase 2 vascular stack accordingly.

Zip-level fix: removed invalid formula in 00_Project_Overview (A6) causing Excel repair; appended overview instructions safely. Added COP-23 Hydration Baseline (append-only). Added new sheet 12_Daily_By_Phase (self-contained daily checklist per phase).
Extended 12_Daily_By_Phase with Phase 3.0 self-contained daily checklist; added Phase 3 watch-for guidance (bleeding/stimulant/vasodilator stacking).
Added Tier column to 01_CPO (CORE/SUPPORT/EXPERIMENT); added 13_Daily_MVP_By_Phase (Minimum Viable daily spine per phase); updated overview instructions.

Rebuilt 12_Daily_By_Phase into a timing-sorted, itemized list per phase (one item per row) with inline Optional flag and interaction notes; preserves self-contained 'what to do today' view without changing CPO/CAS/COP.

Rebuilt 12_Daily_By_Phase from CPO/COP so each phase is cumulative (includes all prior applicable items) and phase-appropriate (COP Phase Allowed enforced). Added 14_Print_View sheet for one-page-per-phase print-style listing with optionals inline.
Added continuation metadata columns to 01_CPO (CarryForward/Stop-Taper/Maintenance). Updated 12_Daily_By_Phase + 14_Print_View to display stop/taper + maintenance guidance inline per item.

Added BH4/Pterin axis (HFMP-11); added CAS items: TMG, Royal Jelly, Sepiapterin, Sapropterin, and RESET-only Hops (8-PN); added CLAB: serum bile acids + homocysteine; created separate RESET track sheet with governance.

CPO audit: fixed NAC & Niacin (flush) ID refs; added BH4/NOS module items (Royal Jelly, Sepiapterin, Sapropterin); added TMG methyl-buffer rail; added cocoa flavanols + artichoke/milk thistle options; added lab gates (serum bile acids, homocysteine) to progression; reinforced RESET separation note.
Added 16_TEMP_PHASE_STACK: per-phase maximal menu (CPO + full CAS + COP) with heuristic Strength/Safety ranks (1–3) and MAIN vs RESET separation for temporary protocol regeneration.

Integrated Turnbuckle-inspired modules (stem cell renewal + mitochondrial dynamics) into COP and daily practices: added Prolonged Water Fasting (Autophagy/Renewal), HBOT Cycle, and Mitochondrial Dynamics Training module; surfaced in Phase 2.0/3.0 Practices and TEMP phase menu. (Sources: Gemini Deep Research / Radical Architectures).
